title: Odd semester registration instructions available on the website now
excerpt: Detailed instructions for the odd semester registration for B.Tech, M.Tech, and PhD are now available.

title: Advertisement for Positions in Start-up and Incubation Cell on contract basis
excerpt: Applications are invited for various contractual positions in the Start-up and Incubation Cell.

title: Advertisement for various research positions under ANRF-PAIR Initiative
excerpt: Applications are invited from interested candidates for various research positions to work on the cybersecurity-based research project, sanctioned under the project entitled “ANRF PAIR IITB HUB (ANRF/PAIR/2025/000017/PAIR)-A” under the Anusandhan National Research Foundation-Partnerships for Accelerated Innovation and Research (ANRF-PAIR) initiative.

title: RECRUITMENT NOTICE FOR THE POST OF ASSISTANT PROFFESOR (TEMPORARY)
excerpt: The institute is seeking qualified candidates with strong academic backgrounds, preferably with PhD qualifications and relevant teaching, research, or industry experience.

title: Extension of Deadline for P.hD Applications
excerpt: The Deadline for P.hD applications for 2026 has been extended.

title: Admissions for B.Tech 2026-27 via JoSAA/CSAB are now open
excerpt: The JoSAA counseling process will begin shortly. Prospective candidates are requested to check the portal for regular updates on opening and closing ranks.

title: IIIT Pune secures top rank in National Smart India Hackathon 2024
excerpt: Our students demonstrated excellent problem-solving skills at the national level hackathon, securing the first prize in the hardware edition.

title: New AI & Robotics Research lab inaugurated by the Director
excerpt: The new laboratory is equipped with state-of-the-art GPUs for deep learning research and advanced robotic arms for autonomous systems.

title: Call for Papers: International Conference on VLSI and Embedded Systems
excerpt: The Department of ECE is organizing the annual conference. Researchers are invited to submit their original work by June 30.

title: Excellent Placement Season 2024-25 with Highest Package of 53 LPA
excerpt: The institute witnessed a record-breaking placement season with top recruiters including Atlassian, Microsoft, and Amazon visiting the campus.
